case_title: PARKER PHARISS VS. LAUREL REALTY ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHARISS, PARKER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,552.00, DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY DID NOT FOLLOW STATUTORY REQUIREMENTS TO WITHHOLD SECURITY DEPOSIT AND THEREFORE MUST REFUND IT. DEFENDANT NEWMAN IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOLLOWING FAILURE OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY NEWMAN, KURZBARD
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 (AMENDED ADDING AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT) FILED BY PHARISS, PARKER AS TO DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY NEWMAN, KURZBARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $1 SERVED JAN-03-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT LAUREL REALTY NEWMAN, KURZBARD MAILED TO RESPONDENT PHARISS, PARKER
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFER FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-05-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD THE PROPERTY OWNER--LANDLORD", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON LAUREL REALTY IS INCOMPLETE AND LAUREL REALTY INITIALLY SAID THEY WAIVED, THEN CHANGED THEIR MIND WHEN THE JPT ASKED ABOUT IT. JPT LAVINE ASKED LAUREL REALTY IF THEY WERE SERVED WITH THE CLAIM AND THEY SAID YES. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FINDS THE PROOF OF SERVICE IS OK. PLAINTIFF FILED TWO PROOFS OF SERVICE ON LAUREL REALTY, INSISTING JUDGE MITCHELL ADVISED HIM THIS WOULD BE A WAY TO SERVE KURZBARD NEWMAN. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE DETERMINES THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT KURZBARD NEWMAN, WHO IS NOT PRESENT AND IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO KURZBARD NEWMAN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-05-2016 AT 3:30 PM. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT NEWMAN. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY LAUREL REALTY PHARISS, PARKER
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-17-2016 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-17-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREISS; CLERK J. KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525.
SMALL CLAIM APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2016 DISMISSED - SETTLED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFER TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO ADD AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT (KURZBARD NEWMAN) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHARISS, PARKER
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHARISS, PARKER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY PHARISS, PARKER AS TO DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $ 1- SERVED NOV-06-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $1 SERVED JAN-03-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2016 - JUDGMENT.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-18-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, March 17, 2016, in Department 525:
Parker Phariss, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Laurel Realty, Appellant/Defendant appears by manager.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Parties informed the Court that they have come to an agreement to settle the case.
Court informs the parties that Court will dismissed the appeal only due to a settlement but the Small Claims judgment will stands and it is the parties' responsibility to filed the satisfaction of judgment with the Small Claims Court.

Court Adjourn.

Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-04-2015 Continued To Feb-05-16 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
